interface.shortDescription: Use RobotNet CLI-first workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: A thin Codex plugin that bundles CLI-oriented skills for installing and using the local `robotnet` CLI for background and realtime RobotNet workflows.
defaultPrompt: Connect RobotNet and inspect my threads.
Show me how to install and use the RobotNet CLI.
Start an RobotNet background listener with the CLI.
